---
title: "Workshop"
author: "Shunqi Zhang"
date: "2026-07-21"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## Task 0; Set Working Directory 

```{r iris0, echo= F}

#Set your OWN working directory 
setwd("C:/Users/rmjdszh/OneDrive - University College London/Iris_repo")

```

## Task 1: Read the csv
```{r iris1, echo=FALSE}

#Iris is available in R library 'datasets'
iris <- iris

print(iris)

```
